description: Out-of-scope (bipolar-spectrum, edge-with-depression): description points clearly to bipolar-spectrum territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'bipolar-spectrum'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I've been depressed for a few months now. But the thing is, it's not constant — I have these stretches in between where I feel almost manic. Two weeks ago I cleaned my whole apartment, painted a wall, started a podcast, didn't sleep. Now I'm back to barely moving.
